title: Amazon Product Sourcer
subtitle: Web Scraper
description: BeautifulSoup web scraper that scans the internet for products to buy and resell on Amazon. Outputs a spreadsheet of products sorted by profit margin with all necessary product info for a human to purchase products for resale. This tool was used to generate over $20k in sales on my Amazon storefront.
